explorationLog.title: Excellence Without Borders
explorationLog.details: Proposed messaging framework drafted by UCM to communicate the value proposition of the newly merged college.

explorationLog.title: Explaining advisor shift to current students?
explorationLog.details: The holistic advising experience has been a key marketing point. How do we explain the loss of the two-advisor benefit to current students?

explorationLog.title: Honors vs. Global culture integration
explorationLog.details: Honors is strong but conventional; Global is more innovative. The merged value proposition must integrate both seamlessly. Community building is the key connector.

recommendations.title: Leverage Study Abroad Metrics
recommendations.why: With 24% of honors students currently traveling, there is a clear opportunity to increase global engagement inside the honors cohort.

recommendations.title: Shift to Single Holistic Advisor Messaging
recommendations.why: Eliminate the two-advisor model in marketing materials moving forward to ensure alignment with operational constraints.

themeNotes:
# Global & Honors Merged Focus

- Active markets identified: Rwanda, India, Brazil, Kyrgyzstan.
- Upcoming locations: Florence, Kazakhstan.
- Focus on building 'community' as the bridge that connects the Honors and Global student experiences.

meetingNotes.title: Global Theme Strategy Meeting
meetingNotes.summary: Focused heavily on establishing a value proposition for the merged College. Dropped 'Excellence Without Borders' framing for review. Addressed ongoing logistical hurdles regarding academic advisory pivots.
